title: Savory German Pasta Bake
description: A hearty, comforting dish that combines the flavors of Germany with the ease of a pasta bake. Rich, savory sauce and a blend of cheeses make this a satisfying meal.
instructions: Cook penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Stir in canned tomatoes, beef broth, and sour cream. Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, tomato mixture, and chopped parsley. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and top with shredded cheddar cheese and grated Parmesan cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
